title: Rape
description: Sexual intercourse with a woman without her consent or against her will constitutes rape under BNS Section 63. Punishable with rigorous imprisonment of not less than 10 years, extendable to life imprisonment.

title: Assault or Criminal Force to Woman with Intent to Outrage Modesty
description: Whoever assaults or uses criminal force to any woman, intending to outrage or knowing it likely to outrage her modesty, shall be punishable with imprisonment up to 5 years and fine.

title: Sexual Harassment
description: Whoever commits sexual harassment shall be punished. Sexual harassment includes unwelcome physical contact, demands or requests for sexual favours, making sexually coloured remarks, showing pornography.

title: Extortion
description: Putting a person in fear of injury in order to obtain property, repayment, or money can amount to extortion.

title: Criminal Intimidation
description: Threatening injury to person, family, reputation, or property to force action constitutes criminal intimidation.

title: Intentional Insult
description: Intentional insult intended to provoke breach of peace can be punishable, including abusive coercive language.

title: Violation of Privacy
description: Capturing, publishing, or transmitting private images without consent can violate privacy protections.

title: Publishing or Transmitting Obscene Content
description: Publishing or transmitting obscene material in electronic form is punishable under the IT Act.

title: Borrower Consent and Protection
description: Digital lenders and partners must follow consent-based data collection and prohibit harassment during collections.

title: Fair Recovery Practices
description: NBFC recovery must avoid intimidation, threats, abusive behavior, and privacy violations during loan recovery.
